name: Bordelaise Sauce-Steve
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan over low heat.
2. Add flour and stir until smooth.
3. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in minced green onion, chopped fresh parsley, bayleaf, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper.
5. Gradually add beef broth and red wine, stirring constantly.
6. Cook over medium-high heat until thickened and bubbly.
7. Remove the bay leaf.
8. Yields about 1 1/2 cups.
